subject: Follow-up tasks for Kernel lane
body: Kernel E2E summary received: PASS-WARN (10/11 recovery tests). Great work. Several items flagged for follow-up:

tasks.description: Document missing scripts - collision-check.js and test-phase4-gates.js referenced but not found on kernel lane. Are these expected to exist or misplaced?
Resolve Archivist PEM fingerprint mismatch in sync gate - kernel reports archivist PEM fingerprint doesn't match expected. Can kernel generate corrected trust store entry?
Review 4 unsigned legacy outbox messages - flagged by GAP-009/011 validation. Are these stale messages needing cleanup or do they need signatures backfilled?
Post-compact audit shows 'conflicted' status - is this pre-existing or does it need resolution before Round 9 can proceed?

_lane_worker.detail: Missing required field: schema_version; Missing required field: task_id; Missing required field: idempotency_key; Missing required field: payload; Missing required field: execution; Missing required field: lease; Missing required field: retry; Missing required field: evidence; Missing required field: evidence_exchange; Missing required field: heartbeat; task_kind is required for task/response/escalation/handoff messages
